specific_question: In Q3 2024, what documentation did patients receive immediately after their virtual consultation ended, and will this trend continue into 2025?
answer: In Q3 2024, patients received an automated email with appointment date and provider name, but no itemized billing breakdown, next steps, or follow-up instructions until 24-48 hours later, when the full visit summary was manually processed. Because there have currently been no updates to the system, this trend will continue into 2025.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
